positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a celestial wanderer silhouette, incorporating elements of mythology and modern cosmic design. The main subject is a crescent moon cradling a geometric representation of a nebula, outlined by intricate constellations and glowing etheric particles. The style is ethereal, graphic novel, and vintage astronomical poster art, utilizing limited, high-contrast colors: deep indigo, luminous cyan, stark white, and muted gold leaf accents. The composition is centered and highly symmetrical, designed for maximum visual impact on clothing. The atmosphere is serene and magical, with crisp, clean lines and bold negative space. Vector illustration quality, perfect for sublimation printing.
